responsibilities: Render context-sensitive keybinding hints based on Mode
Support 7 distinct mode legends (Normal, Detail, LogTail, Filter, ActionPopup, NewCard, Subshell)
Conditionally render F-key bar when terminal height > 30 rows
Apply syntax-highlighted color spans (Cyan for keys, DarkGray for labels, Yellow for prompts)
key_functions: normal_legend(), detail_legend(), logtail_legend(), filter_legend(), action_popup_legend(), new_card_legend(), subshell_legend() — mode-specific builders
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/widgets/footer.rs.test_coverage: 12 unit tests covering all legend builders and F-key bar

changes: Footer height now dynamic: 2 rows when terminal_height > 30, else 1 row
Replaced static Paragraph footer with render_footer() call
Updated Layout constraint from Length(1) to Length(footer_height)
Added terminal_height calculation and pass-through to render_footer
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/mod.rs.design: Three-zone layout (header 2 rows, body fill, footer 1-2 rows)

patterns_discovered.mode_dispatch_pattern: Switch statement on app.mode returns appropriate legend spans — extensible for new modes
patterns_discovered.span_builder_pattern: Each mode has dedicated legend builder returning Vec<Span<'static>> — alternates key styling (Cyan) with description (DarkGray)
patterns_discovered.conditional_rendering: F-key bar only renders when area.height >= 2 AND terminal_height > FKEY_BAR_MIN_HEIGHT — prevents layout overflow
patterns_discovered.input_field_pattern: Format string with query/input + BLOCK_CURSOR (█) for visual cursor feedback
patterns_discovered.early_return_guard: Check area.height/width > 0 before rendering to avoid panic on zero-sized regions

gotchas_discovered.newcard_mode_incomplete: NewCard legend renders empty input initially — comment indicates NewCard input buffer wiring deferred to separate subtask
gotchas_discovered.fkey_bar_boundary: F-key bar only shows when terminal_height STRICTLY > 30 (not >=) — matches mc convention but could be misunderstood
gotchas_discovered.layout_allocation_coupling: Caller must allocate 2 rows in Layout::vertical when terminal_height > 30, else footer gets truncated — tight coupling between mod.rs and footer.rs
gotchas_discovered.static_lifetime_spans: All legend spans use 'static lifetime via String::into() — acceptable for fixed strings but requires care if dynamic content is added later
gotchas_discovered.zero_size_area_silent_fail: render_footer returns early if area.height/width == 0 — silent no-op, no error logged

approach_outcome.completeness: 100% — all 7 modes implemented with keybindings, colors, and tests
approach_outcome.design_alignment: Follows spec exactly: Normal mode shows [h/l]col [j/k]card [...], Detail shows [j/k]scroll [F3]logs [...], etc.
approach_outcome.integration: Cleanly wired into render loop; footer height dynamically allocated based on terminal size
approach_outcome.test_coverage: 12 unit tests for legend builders and keybinding presence
approach_outcome.code_quality: Well-documented with inline comments; consistent naming (normal_legend, detail_legend, etc.); modular builder functions

recommendations.item: Wire NewCard input buffer in NewCard subtask — currently renders placeholder empty input; need to pass input state from app.rs
Make keybinding colors/styles configurable via theme struct — currently hardcoded (Cyan, DarkGray, Yellow); allow user/theme overrides
Add optional F-key bar toggle in app state — currently always shown when height > 30; some users may prefer minimal mode
Consider subtle mode-transition animation (fade/color pulse) when switching between modes — footer already updates per frame, could add visual feedback
Add integration test in harness that renders footer in different terminal heights and validates F-key bar presence/absence
Add reference to F-key bar behavior in main bop UI docs — 30-row threshold is currently only documented in footer.rs constant
